name: Elizabeth Burris' Broccoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the broccoli into small pieces, using all of it except the end chunks.
2. Mix together the broccoli, onion, sunflower seeds, raisins, and mushrooms in a bowl.
3. Make the dressing by mixing the mayonnaise, vinegar, and sugar (if using) in a separate bowl.
4. Twenty minutes before serving, toss the salad with the bacon and the dressing.
